summary: A small but globally punching trade nation — home of Shell, ASML (which makes chips the whole world needs), the world's largest port (Rotterdam), and a key node in global tax avoidance structures.

history.detail: World's first multinational; Amsterdam becomes global financial capital.
20,000 Dutch starved in winter 1944; country liberated 1945.

leverage_tools: ASML monopoly on EUV lithography machines

resources.oil_gas: Groningen gas field (now closing due to earthquakes from extraction)
resources.water: 25% below sea level; world leader in water management
resources.agriculture: World's 2nd largest food exporter (after USA) despite tiny size; greenhouse tech

follow_the_money.detail: Dutch Special Purpose Vehicles route ~$4T/yr in corporate profits; EU pressure forcing reform
Only company making EUV machines needed for advanced chips; US uses Dutch law to block China sales

theories_disputed.detail: Dutch intelligence AIVD confirmed to have infiltrated Russian Cozy Bear APT network 2014-2017 and warned FBI.

connections.detail: ASML export controls on China coordinated with US
ASML chip machine export restrictions flashpoint
